post_text: Breaking: miracle herb cures every virus in 24 hours. Watch this video proof.
transcript: This herb is guaranteed to cure all viruses instantly. Doctors do not want you to know.

frames.description: Presenter holding unlabelled bottle with bold cure claim banner
Close-up text says 100 percent cure guaranteed

label: fake

post_text: Video from local emergency office confirms road closure after flooding.
transcript: Officials say the bridge is closed until inspections are complete.

frames.description: Road barrier and official emergency vehicle
Sign reads bridge closed pending inspection

label: real
gold_evidence: bridge is closed until inspections are complete
